---
title: "Abdelkarim el Ghani"
subtitle: "Data Scientist | Neuroscience"
image: profile_pic_akg.jpg
image-alt: Photo of Abdelkarim el Ghani
about:
  template: jolla
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: round
  id: hero-heading
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/abdelkarimelghani
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/AKG3490
---


```{=html}
  <style>
body {
  background-image: url('/background-pic.jpg');
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-attachment: fixed;
}

  </style>
```

::: {#hero-heading}
<div class="h2"> Hello </div>
This is the digital space where I showcase my work in neuroscience, data analysis, and open science. From statistical modeling to research projects, this portfolio highlights my passion for uncovering insights through data and advancing transparent, reproducible science.
:::

::: {.callout-note title="Resources"}
[Create websites using Quarto](https://posit-conf-2024.github.io/quarto-websites/){target="_blank"}

[The GRAPH Courses](https://thegraphcourses.org/courses/websites-and-dashboards-with-r/topics/creating-a-personal-website-optional/){target="_blank"}

[Happy Git and GitHub for the useR](https://happygitwithr.com/){target="_blank"}
:::
